title: Refund window
text: Customers may request a full refund for any unredeemed voucher within 14 days of purchase, no questions asked. After 14 days, refunds are credit-only unless the deal has been pulled or the merchant cannot honour the booking. Refunds for redeemed vouchers are not permitted unless the merchant has explicitly authorised one in writing.

title: Refunds beyond the standard window
text: Refund requests outside the 14-day window require a documented merchant issue (cancellation, no-show, hygiene complaint, safety concern). Agents may issue store credit up to the deal value. Cash refunds beyond 14 days require a Tier-2 escalation with case notes.

title: Voucher redemption
text: Vouchers are valid until the expiration date printed on the voucher. After expiration, the customer retains the cash value paid for an additional 12 months and can redeem it as credit toward another deal. Vouchers cannot be combined with other promotions unless explicitly stated on the deal page.

title: Order status lookup
text: Order status is one of: PLACED, PAYMENT_HELD, CONFIRMED, FULFILLED, CANCELLED, REFUNDED. Confirmed orders can no longer be modified by self-service. Customers can view live status in their account; agents should always cite the timestamp of the most recent status transition when responding.

title: Lost or delayed delivery
text: If a physical item is more than 5 business days past its estimated delivery date, agents may either reissue the order at no cost (preferred) or offer a full refund. The customer chooses. Carriers must be queried for a final status before reissuing. Lost-package claims must be filed with the carrier within 30 days.

title: Pre-sale deal questions
text: All material deal terms are on the deal page: validity dates, redemption windows, location, what is and is not included, and any age or fitness restrictions. Agents must direct customers to the deal page rather than restating terms, since terms can change. If the deal page is unclear, escalate to the merchant via the Merchant Center.

title: Cancellations and modifications
text: Within the cancellation window stated on the deal, customers may cancel for a full refund. Outside the window, the merchant's cancellation policy applies. Modifications (date, time, party size) are at the merchant's discretion and not guaranteed.

title: Voice and brand guidelines
text: Responses are warm, concise, and never use corporate jargon. Address the customer by first name when known. Open with empathy when the customer has expressed frustration. Close with one clear next step. Never apologise for things you cannot prove happened. Never promise specific timelines that are not in policy.

title: When to escalate
text: Escalate to a human agent when: the customer mentions legal action, the request is outside written policy, the customer is at risk of self-harm, the value at stake is above 500 currency units, or the request requires merchant input that cannot be obtained automatically. Always include a structured handoff packet (intent, attempted resolution, customer state).

title: Customer data and PII
text: Never restate full credit-card numbers, full addresses, or government IDs in a customer-facing message. The order ID and last 4 digits of the payment method are acceptable. PII shown internally is logged for audit but not echoed back.
